title: OCSMP Discs
description: Adds new music discs for OCSMP.
body:
OCSMP Discs is a mod that adds 40 new discs, designed for use with the [OCSMP](https://modrinth.com/modpack/ocsmp) modpack/server.

All new textures designed by [ScytheGD](https://modrinth.com/user/ScytheGD) and members of the OCSMP community.

**CURRENT TRACKLIST**
- AC/DC - Big Balls
- Beluga Lagoon - Charlie
- Casey Edwards - Bury The Light
- C418 - Droopy Likes Your Face
- Cynthia Harrell - Snake Eater
- Daniel Pemberton - Believe in the Hail Mary
- Darude - Sandstorm
- David Bowie - Starman
- deadmau5 - Ameonna
- deadmau5 - Avaritia
- deadmau5 - Bored of Canada
- deadmau5 - Imaginary Friends (ov intro)
- deadmau5 - Strobe
- deadmau5 & Wolfgang Gartner - Channel 43
- DM DOKURO - Scourge of the Universe
- Duran Duran - INVISIBLE
- Franz Ferdinand - Take Me Out
- Heaven Pierce Her - Altars of Apostasy
- Ilmari Hakkola - Bad Piggies Theme
- Jake Chudnow - Moon Men (Instrumental)
- Jason Miller - Red Sun
- Jesse Harlin - Vode An
- Jhariah - PIN-EYE
- Jimmy Gnecco - It Has To Be This Way
- jschlatt - It's the Most Wonderful Time of the Year
